issues_found.description: Stub module listing was incomplete - only 3 of 12 required stub modules were listed in the Files to Modify section
issues_found.fix_applied: Added all 12 stub modules: payment, analytics, ai, campaign, loyalty, inventory, reservation, feedback, integration, pos, kitchen-display, table-management

issues_found.description: Missing APP_DOMAIN environment variable - requirements specify domain 'e-menum.net' but this was not in the environment configuration
issues_found.fix_applied: Added APP_DOMAIN=e-menum.net and JWT expiry settings (JWT_ACCESS_EXPIRY, JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRY) to environment variables

issues_found.description: Missing KVKK/GDPR compliance verification in QA Sign-off Requirements - important for Turkish F&B market as mentioned in CONSTRAINTS.md and MVP_SCOPE.md
issues_found.fix_applied: Added '- [ ] KVKK/GDPR compliance verified (PII handling, data deletion, consent)' to QA requirements

critique_summary: The spec.md is well-structured and technically accurate. Three issues were found and fixed: (1) incomplete stub module listing - added 9 missing stub modules to the Files to Modify section; (2) missing domain configuration - added APP_DOMAIN and JWT expiry settings to environment variables; (3) missing compliance verification - added KVKK/GDPR compliance check to QA sign-off requirements. The spec correctly follows MODULE_SYSTEM.md patterns for directory structure (using _core prefix for core modules) and module.json for manifests. Code patterns for services and controllers are accurate for tsyringe DI and routing-controllers.
recommendations: Consider adding explicit test file naming convention (.spec.ts vs .test.ts) reference in Testing section
The 10-week timeline is aggressive but achievable with proper sprint planning
Ensure reference documents (CLAUDE.md vs MODULE_SYSTEM.md) are aligned on _core vs _system directory naming

technical_accuracy.manifest_filename: PASS - Uses module.json as per MODULE_SYSTEM.md

completeness.enterprise_modules: PASS - menu and order modules specified
completeness.stub_modules: FIXED - Now lists all 12 stub modules
completeness.environment_config: FIXED - Added domain and JWT settings
